query:
WITH inserted AS (
            INSERT INTO messages_unattempted (id, name, hash, payload, published_at)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
            RETURNING id, name, hash, payload, published_at
        ),
        notified AS (
            SELECT pg_notify($6, id::text) FROM inserted
        )
        SELECT id, name, hash, payload, 0::INTEGER AS "attempted!:i32"
        FROM inserted
